_comment: Jar-bundled DEFAULT values for the mob-scaling config (the SIMPLE preset). These are the authoritative defaults, read at load time; the Java loadDefaults() only orchestrates the read (no values baked into Java). Server owners override any of these via mods/MmoMobScaling/mob-scaling.json (the override file stores ONLY customizations). Read synchronously at plugin setup() so the zero-cost registration gate can see 'enabled' before any system is registered.
